description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 29 mins of coding time, with work split mostly across Bash and a small amount of HTML. The data shows activity in 2 projects, but no public repository names, commits, pull requests, or new repos were recorded.
